title: Just Survival
description: A optimization modpack for your game. ect..
body:
The **BEST** optimization Modpack with bunch of mods that you may also **LIKE**, Not game changing though 

  For example (Better third person, boat item view) and more!!!

#   Preformance Mods?

- It uses Sodium, Iris, Chunky, Dynamic fps and extra mods!

##   How is it the best?

Well it uses the best settings for mods even for low - end pc's
and lets be honest some of use don't have good pc's so this is why whis is the best.
Most modpacks only have optimization but some of us want more like adding more mods for gameplay and not just optimization.

### Why did i do this

I don't have a very good pc and i didn't only want optimization so i made my own for good FPS and a good experience by adding mods that should be implemented into minecraft.
